name: @lynx-js/node-lynx-darwin-arm64
description: The dependency artifacts of @lynx-js/node-lynx on the Darwin ARM64 platform.

scripts.pack: cd ../../ && npm run build:publish:darwin && cp build/darwin/Release/node_lynx.node platform/darwin-arm64/ && cd platform/darwin-arm64 && npm pack
scripts.build:debug: cd ../../ && npm run build:debug:darwin && cp build/darwin/Debug/node_lynx.node platform/darwin-arm64/ && cd platform/darwin-arm64 && npm pack

author: Lynx Authors
